title: File:Diving in Cabo San Lucas.webm
name: Cabo San Lucas
desc: Diving in Cabo San Lucas, Mexico on January 11, 2016. A single take from diving the wreck near Land's End. Video shows yellow goatfish (Mulloidichthys martinicus), blue-and-gold snappers (Lutjanus viridis), and Chinese trumpetfish (Aulostomus chinensis).
